  <meta name="theme-color" content="#00A97F">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">

  <style>
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
    body{margin:0;color:#1A1A1A;font-family:Inter,system-ui;line-height:1.7;background:#F7F9F8;overflow-x:hidden}
    :root{--green:#006C4F;--emerald:#00A97F;--gold:#D4B47A;--ink:#1A1A1A;--soft:#F7F9F8;--muted:#6B7280;--grad-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#006C4F 0%,#00A97F 48%,#D4B47A 100%);--grad-deep:linear-gradient(135deg,#003C29 0%,#007B55 52%,#C7A45E 100%);--shadow-soft:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);--shadow-med:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.1);--shadow-strong:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.15);--transition:all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)}
    [dir="rtl"]{font-family:Cairo,Inter,system-ui}
    [dir="rtl"] .article-main ul,[dir="rtl"] .article-main ol{margin-right:24px;margin-left:0}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;transition:var(--transition)}
    img{max-width:100%;display:block}
    .container{max-width:1240px;margin-inline:auto;padding-inline:24px}
    @keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
    header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.08);box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)}
    .bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;padding:12px 0}
    .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
    .logo{width:240px;height:90px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite}
    .logo img{width:100%;height:auto;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(0,108,79,0.2))}
    .logo:hover{transform:scale(1.05)}
    .navwrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px}
    .primary{display:flex;gap:8px}
    .primary a{padding:10px 18px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:600;transition:var(--transition);position:relative}
    .primary a::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,169,127,0.08);border-radius:12px;opacity:0;transition:var(--transition)}
    .primary a:hover::before,.primary a.active::before{opacity:1}
    .primary a:hover,.primary a.active{color:var(--green)}
    .lang-switch{display:flex;gap:.5rem;align-items:center}
    .lang-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:42px;min-width:56px;padding:0 .9rem;border-radius:999px;font-weight:700;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);background:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.04);transition:.2s ease;color:#555}
    .lang-pill:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);color:var(--green)}
    .lang-pill.is-active{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00A97F,#006C4F);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,169,127,.25)}
    .hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:10px;z-index:60}
    .hamburger span{width:26px;height:3px;background:var(--green);border-radius:3px;transition:var(--transition)}
    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(1){transform:rotate(45deg) translate(7px,7px)}
    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(3){transform:rotate(-45deg) translate(7px,-7px)}
    .mobile-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);z-index:54;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);backdrop-filter:blur(2px)}
    .mobile-overlay.active{opacity:1;visibility:visible}
    .mobile-menu{position:fixed;top:0;right:-100%;width:86%;max-width:420px;height:100vh;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%);z-index:55;box-shadow:-8px 0 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);transition:right 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-radius:20px 0 0 20px;overflow:hidden}
    .mobile-menu.active{right:0}
    [dir="rtl"] .mobile-menu{right:auto;left:-100%;border-radius:0 20px 20px 0}
    [dir="rtl"] .mobile-menu.active{left:0}
    .mobile-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)}
    .mobile-head .logo{width:180px;height:68px;animation:none}
    .mobile-close{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.12);display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
    .mobile-close:hover{background:#fff;transform:scale(1.05)}
    .mobile-close svg{width:18px;height:18px;opacity:.7}
    .mobile-list{padding:14px 10px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;overflow:auto}
    .mobile-list a{padding:14px;border-radius:14px;font-weight:600;transition:var(--transition)}
    .mobile-list a:hover{background:rgba(0,108,79,0.04)}
    .mobile-list a.active{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,169,127,0.08),rgba(0,169,127,0.06));color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(0,169,127,0.15)}
    .lang-section{margin-top:auto;padding:14px 18px;border-top:1px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.08);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)}
    .lang-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:#6B7280;font-weight:700;margin:6px 2px 10px}
    .lang-label svg{width:18px;height:18px;opacity:.9}
    .lang-section .lang-switch{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(241,245,244,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.1);border-radius:999px;padding:8px}
    .lang-section .lang-pill{flex:1;text-align:center;font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;min-width:60px}
    .hero-article{position:relative;isolation:isolate;overflow:hidden;padding:100px 0 60px}
    .hero-article::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-30% -15% -15% -15%;background:var(--grad-deep);z-index:-2;transform:skewY(-3deg) scale(1.05)}
    .hero-article::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(1400px 560px at 70% 15%,rgba(255,213,128,.2),transparent 65%),radial-gradient(1000px 480px at 15% 65%,rgba(0,169,127,.18),transparent 65%);z-index:-1}
    .hero-content{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
    .breadcrumb{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center}
    .breadcrumb a{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);text-decoration:underline}
    .breadcrumb a:hover{color:#fff}
    .kicker{display:inline-flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);padding:10px 18px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:700;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);margin-bottom:20px}
    .hero-title{font-family:Poppins;color:#fff;font-weight:800;line-height:1.15;font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.8rem);text-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.3);margin-bottom:16px}
    [dir="rtl"] .hero-title{font-family:Cairo,Poppins}
    .hero-excerpt{color:#EEFDF6;opacity:.96;font-size:clamp(0.95rem,2vw,1.1rem);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:24px;max-width:700px;margin-inline:auto;padding-inline:16px}
    .hero-meta{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);font-size:0.9rem}
    .hero-meta span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
    .hero-meta svg{width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0}
    .article-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;gap:40px;padding:60px 0}
    .toc-sidebar{position:sticky;top:100px;height:fit-content}
    .toc-box{background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:20px;padding:24px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft)}
    .toc-title{font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:var(--green)}
    .toc-title svg{width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0}
    .toc-list{list-style:none}
    .toc-list li{margin-bottom:8px}
    .toc-list a{display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--muted);transition:var(--transition);border-left:3px solid transparent}
    .toc-list a:hover,.toc-list a.active{color:var(--green);background:rgba(0,169,127,0.08);border-left-color:var(--emerald)}
    [dir="rtl"] .toc-list a{border-left:none;border-right:3px solid transparent}
    [dir="rtl"] .toc-list a:hover,[dir="rtl"] .toc-list a.active{border-right-color:var(--emerald)}
    .article-main{background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:20px;padding:48px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft)}
    .article-main h2{font-family:Poppins;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,3vw,1.75rem);color:var(--green);margin:48px 0 20px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(0,108,79,0.1);position:relative}
    [dir="rtl"] .article-main h2{font-family:Cairo,Poppins}
    .article-main h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-2px;left:0;width:80px;height:2px;background:var(--grad-main)}
    [dir="rtl"] .article-main h2::after{left:auto;right:0}
    .article-main h2:first-child{margin-top:0}
    .article-main h3{font-size:clamp(1.15rem,2.5vw,1.35rem);color:var(--ink);margin:32px 0 16px;font-weight:700}
    .article-main h4{font-size:clamp(1rem,2vw,1.15rem);color:var(--emerald);margin:24px 0 12px;font-weight:700}
    .article-main p{color:#4B5563;margin-bottom:16px}
    .article-main ul,.article-main ol{margin:16px 0 24px 24px;color:#4B5563}
    .article-main li{margin-bottom:8px}
    .article-main strong{color:var(--ink)}
    .info-box{border-radius:16px;padding:20px 24px;margin:24px 0;border:1px solid}
    .info-box.tip{background:rgba(0,169,127,0.08);border-color:rgba(0,169,127,0.2)}
    .info-box.warning{background:rgba(220,38,38,0.08);border-color:rgba(220,38,38,0.2)}
    .info-box.note{background:rgba(212,180,122,0.12);border-color:rgba(212,180,122,0.3)}
    .info-box-title{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
    .info-box.tip .info-box-title{color:var(--green)}
    .info-box.warning .info-box-title{color:#dc2626}
    .info-box.note .info-box-title{color:#b8860b}
    .step-card{background:#F9FAFB;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 24px;margin:16px 0;position:relative;padding-left:70px}
    .step-card::before{content:attr(data-step);position:absolute;left:20px;top:20px;width:36px;height:36px;background:var(--grad-main);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9rem}
    [dir="rtl"] .step-card{padding-left:24px;padding-right:70px}
    [dir="rtl"] .step-card::before{left:auto;right:20px}
    .step-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:1.1rem}
    .step-card p{margin:0;color:#6B7280;font-size:0.95rem}
    .table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;margin:24px 0;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:500px}
    th,td{padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)}
    th{background:rgba(0,169,127,0.08);color:var(--green);font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;white-space:nowrap}
    td{color:#4B5563;font-size:0.9rem}
    tr:hover td{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.02)}
    [dir="rtl"] th,[dir="rtl"] td{text-align:right}
    .feature-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:20px;margin:24px 0}
    .feature-item{padding:24px;border-radius:12px;background:#F9FAFB;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);transition:var(--transition)}
    .feature-item:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-med)}
    .feature-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--grad-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:16px}
    .feature-title{font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--green)}
    .feature-item p{margin:0;font-size:0.9rem;color:#6B7280}
    .actor-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:16px;margin:24px 0}
    .actor-item{padding:16px 20px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(0,169,127,0.1);transition:var(--transition)}
    .actor-item:hover{border-color:var(--emerald);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .actor-item strong{display:block;color:var(--green);font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:4px}
    .actor-item span{font-size:0.85rem;color:#6B7280}
    .cta-section{background:var(--grad-main);border-radius:20px;padding:48px;text-align:center;margin:48px 0;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .cta-section::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M30 0L60 30L30 60L0 30L30 0z' fill='%23ffffff' fill-opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");background-size:40px 40px}
    .cta-content{position:relative;z-index:1}
    .cta-title{font-family:Poppins;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,3vw,1.75rem);color:#fff;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:12px}
    [dir="rtl"] .cta-title{font-family:Cairo,Poppins}
    .cta-text{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);font-size:clamp(0.9rem,2vw,1.05rem);margin-bottom:24px;max-width:600px;margin-inline:auto}
    .cta-buttons{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .cta-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 28px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;transition:var(--transition);font-size:clamp(0.85rem,1.8vw,1rem)}
    .cta-btn.primary{background:#fff;color:var(--green)}
    .cta-btn.secondary{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3)}
    .cta-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-strong)}
    .cta-btn svg{flex-shrink:0}
    
    /* Styles corrigés pour les FAQ */
    .faq-section{margin:48px 0}
    .faq-item{background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border-radius:16px;margin:16px 0;overflow:hidden;transition:var(--transition)}
    .faq-item:hover{border-color:rgba(0,169,127,0.2);box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft)}
    .faq-question{padding:20px 24px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);transition:background 0.3s;gap:16px;font-size:1.05rem}
    .faq-question:hover{background:rgba(0,169,127,0.04)}
    .faq-question span{flex:1;line-height:1.5}
    .faq-answer{padding:0 24px;color:#6B7280;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)}
    .faq-item.active .faq-answer{padding:0 24px 24px;max-height:500px}
    .faq-icon{transition:transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);flex-shrink:0;width:20px;height:20px;color:var(--emerald)}
    .faq-item.active .faq-icon{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .faq-answer p{margin-bottom:12px}
    .faq-answer p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
    
    /* Section Contact améliorée */
    .contact-section{background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:20px;padding:48px;margin:48px 0;box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft)}
    .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;align-items:start}
    .contact-info h3{font-family:Poppins;color:var(--green);font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:24px;font-weight:700}
    [dir="rtl"] .contact-info h3{font-family:Cairo,Poppins}
    .contact-methods{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px}
    .contact-method{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;padding:20px;border-radius:12px;background:#F9FAFB;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);transition:var(--transition)}
    .contact-method:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-soft);border-color:var(--emerald)}
    .contact-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--grad-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:1.25rem;flex-shrink:0}
    .contact-details h4{color:var(--green);margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:600}
    .contact-details p{margin:0;color:#6B7280;font-size:0.95rem}
    .contact-form-container h3{font-family:Poppins;color:var(--green);font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:24px;font-weight:700}
    [dir="rtl"] .contact-form-container h3{font-family:Cairo,Poppins}
    .contact-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px}
    .form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
    .form-group label{font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);font-size:0.95rem}
    .form-input,.form-textarea{padding:14px 16px;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);border-radius:12px;font-size:1rem;transition:var(--transition);background:#fff;font-family:inherit}
    .form-input:focus,.form-textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--emerald);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(0,169,127,0.1)}
    .form-textarea{min-height:120px;resize:vertical}
    .form-submit{background:var(--grad-main);color:#fff;border:none;padding:16px 32px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}
    .form-submit:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-strong)}
    .form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
    
    footer{background:var(--grad-main);color:#fff;padding:64px 0 24px}
    .footgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;gap:32px;margin-bottom:48px}
    .footgrid h4{margin-bottom:16px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem}
    .footgrid ul{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:10px}
    .footgrid p{opacity:.95}
    footer a{opacity:.9}
    footer a:hover{color:var(--gold);opacity:1}
    .copy{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);padding-top:24px;text-align:center;opacity:.85}
    .reading-progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:0%;height:3px;background:var(--grad-main);z-index:100}
    [dir="rtl"] .reading-progress{left:auto;right:0}
    .scroll-top{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;width:48px;height:48px;background:var(--grad-main);border:none;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);z-index:40;box-shadow:var(--shadow-med)}
    .scroll-top.visible{opacity:1;visibility:visible}

    <article class="article-main">
      <section id="introduction">
        <h2 data-i18n="intro_title">Comprendre le calcul des droits et taxes à l'importation</h2>
        <p data-i18n="intro_p1">L'importation de marchandises au Maroc implique le paiement de droits et taxes dont le calcul peut sembler complexe. Cette complexité réside dans l'imbrication de plusieurs taxes et la nécessité de respecter des procédures douanières spécifiques.</p>
        <p data-i18n="intro_p2">Une estimation précise de ces coûts est essentielle pour établir un budget réaliste et éviter les mauvaises surprises lors du dédouanement.</p>
        
        <div class="info-box tip">
          <div class="info-box-title">💡 <span data-i18n="tip_title">À savoir</span></div>
          <p data-i18n="tip_content">Les droits et taxes sont calculés sur la valeur CAF (Coût Assurance Fret) de la marchandise, qui inclut le prix d'achat, le transport et l'assurance jusqu'au port marocain.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="taxes-composition">
        <h2 data-i18n="taxes_title">Composition des droits et taxes à l'importation</h2>
        <p data-i18n="taxes_p1">Le calcul des taxes d'importation au Maroc repose sur quatre composantes principales :</p>
        
        <div class="feature-grid">
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-icon">%</div>
            <h3 class="feature-title" data-i18n="di_title">Droits d'Importation (DI)</h3>
            <p data-i18n="di_desc">Taxe ad valorem calculée sur la valeur CAF, variant selon la nature des produits (0% à 40%).</p>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-icon">🏛️</div>
            <h3 class="feature-title" data-i18n="tpi_title">Taxe Parafiscale à l'Import (TPI)</h3>
            <p data-i18n="tpi_desc">Taxe de 0,25% appliquée sur la valeur CAF pour financer divers organismes.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-icon">💰</div>
            <h3 class="feature-title" data-i18n="tva_title">TVA à l'Importation (20%)</h3>
            <p data-i18n="tva_desc">Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée calculée sur la valeur CAF + DI + TPI + autres taxes.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-icon">⚡</div>
            <h3 class="feature-title" data-i18n="tic_title">Taxe Intérieure de Consommation (TIC)</h3>
            <p data-i18n="tic_desc">Taxe spécifique sur certains produits comme les boissons, tabacs, et produits pétroliers.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th data-i18n="table_tax">Taxe</th>
                <th data-i18n="table_rate">Taux</th>
                <th data-i18n="table_base">Base de calcul</th>
                <th data-i18n="table_example">Exemple pour 100 000 DH CAF</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="di_full">Droits d'Importation</td>
                <td>2.5% à 40%</td>
                <td data-i18n="base_caf">Valeur CAF</td>
                <td>10 000 DH (10%)</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tpi_full">Taxe Parafiscale</td>
                <td>0,25%</td>
                <td data-i18n="base_caf">Valeur CAF</td>
                <td>250 DH</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tva_full">TVA à l'Import</td>
                <td>20%</td>
                <td data-i18n="base_caf_di_tpi">CAF + DI + TPI</td>
                <td>22 050 DH</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tic_full">TIC</td>
                <td>Varie</td>
                <td data-i18n="base_quantity">Quantité/Volume</td>
                <td>Selon produit</td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="calcul-etapes">
        <h2 data-i18n="steps_title">Étapes détaillées du calcul</h2>
        
        <div class="step-card" data-step="1">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step1_title">Déterminer la valeur CAF</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step1_desc">La valeur CAF = Prix d'achat + Fret transport + Assurance jusqu'au port marocain.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="step-card" data-step="2">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step2_title">Calculer les Droits d'Importation (DI)</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step2_desc">DI = Valeur CAF × Taux DI (consulter le tarif douanier pour le taux spécifique).</p>
        </div>

        <div class="step-card" data-step="3">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step3_title">Calculer la Taxe Parafiscale (TPI)</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step3_desc">TPI = Valeur CAF × 0,25% (taux fixe de la taxe parafiscale).</p>
        </div>

        <div class="step-card" data-step="4">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step4_title">Calculer l'assiette TVA</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step4_desc">Assiette TVA = Valeur CAF + DI + TPI + Autres taxes éventuelles.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="step-card" data-step="5">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step5_title">Calculer la TVA</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step5_desc">TVA = Assiette TVA × 20% (taux standard de TVA au Maroc).</p>
        </div>

        <div class="step-card" data-step="6">
          <h3 class="step-title" data-i18n="step6_title">Ajouter la TIC si applicable</h3>
          <p data-i18n="step6_desc">Pour les produits spécifiques, ajouter la Taxe Intérieure de Consommation calculée selon les barèmes.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="exemple-pratique">
        <h2 data-i18n="example_title">Exemple pratique de calcul</h2>
        <p data-i18n="example_p1">Prenons l'exemple d'une importation de machines industrielles d'une valeur CAF de 500 000 DH :</p>
        
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th data-i18n="table_component">Composante</th>
                <th data-i18n="table_calculation">Calcul</th>
                <th data-i18n="table_amount">Montant (DH)</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="base_caf">Valeur CAF</td>
                <td>-</td>
                <td>500 000</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="di_full">Droits d'Importation</td>
                <td>500 000 × 10%</td>
                <td>50 000</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tpi_full">Taxe Parafiscale</td>
                <td>500 000 × 0,25%</td>
                <td>1 250</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tva_base">Assiette TVA</td>
                <td>500 000 + 50 000 + 1 250</td>
                <td>551 250</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td data-i18n="tva_full">TVA à l'Import</td>
                <td>551 250 × 20%</td>
                <td>110 250</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td><strong data-i18n="total_taxes">Total taxes</strong></td>
                <td><strong>50 000 + 1 250 + 110 250</strong></td>
                <td><strong>161 500</strong></td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <td><strong data-i18n="total_payable">Total à payer</strong></td>
                <td><strong>500 000 + 161 500</strong></td>
                <td><strong>661 500</strong></td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <div class="info-box note">
          <div class="info-box-title">📝 <span data-i18n="note_title">Note importante</span></div>
          <p data-i18n="note_content">Dans cet exemple, les taxes représentent 32,3% de la valeur CAF. Ce pourcentage varie selon le taux des droits d'importation applicable.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="acteurs-impliques">
        <h2 data-i18n="actors_title">Acteurs impliqués dans le processus</h2>
        <p data-i18n="actors_p1">Plusieurs intervenants participent au processus de calcul et de paiement des droits et taxes :</p>
        
        <div class="actor-grid">
          <div class="actor-item">
            <strong data-i18n="actor_import">Importateur</strong>

      </section>

      <section id="conseils-experts">
        <h2 data-i18n="tips_title">Conseils experts pour optimiser vos coûts</h2>
        
        <div class="info-box tip">
          <div class="info-box-title">🎯 <span data-i18n="strategy_title">Stratégies d'optimisation</span></div>
          <ul>
            <li data-i18n="tip1">Vérifiez les accords de libre-échange (UE, USA, Turquie, etc.)</li>
            <li data-i18n="tip2">Optimisez l'emballage pour réduire le poids et volume</li>
            <li data-i18n="tip3">Négociez les termes Incoterms avec vos fournisseurs</li>
            <li data-i18n="tip4">Consultez un transitaire expérimenté avant l'importation</li>
            <li data-i18n="tip5">Tenez compte des exonérations sectorielles</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="info-box warning">
          <div class="info-box-title">⚠️ <span data-i18n="warning_title">Pièges à éviter</span></div>
          <ul>
            <li data-i18n="warning1">Sous-évaluer la valeur des marchandises</li>
            <li data-i18n="warning2">Négliger la classification douanière</li>
            <li data-i18n="warning3">Oublier les taxes spécifiques (TIC)</li>
            <li data-i18n="warning4">Mauvaise déclaration d'origine</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section id="faq" class="faq-section">
        <h2 data-i18n="faq_title">Questions Fréquentes</h2>
        
        <div class="faq-item active">
          <div class="faq-question">
            <span data-i18n="faq1_q">Comment connaître le taux de droits d'importation applicable ?</span>
            <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="faq-answer">
            <p data-i18n="faq1_a">Consultez le tarif douanier marocain ou faites appel à un transitaire. Le taux dépend du code SH (Système Harmonisé) de votre produit. Vous pouvez également consulter le site web de l'Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects (ADII) pour les mises à jour des taux.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-question">
            <span data-i18n="faq2_q">Peut-on récupérer la TVA payée à l'importation ?</span>
            <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="faq-answer">
            <p data-i18n="faq2_a">Oui, si vous êtes assujetti à la TVA et que les marchandises sont utilisées pour une activité économique taxable, vous pouvez déduire cette TVA. La TVA à l'importation est récupérable sous certaines conditions :</p>
            <ul>
              <li data-i18n="faq2_a1">Être immatriculé à la TVA</li>
              <li data-i18n="faq2_a2">Disposer de la facture d'importation (Document Unique de Dédouanement)</li>

    function toggleMobileMenu() {
      hamburger.classList.toggle('active');
      mobileMenu.classList.toggle('active');
      mobileOverlay.classList.toggle('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = mobileMenu.classList.contains('active') ? 'hidden' : '';
    }

    hamburger.addEventListener('click', toggleMobileMenu);
    mobileClose.addEventListener('click', toggleMobileMenu);
    mobileOverlay.addEventListener('click', toggleMobileMenu);

    // Gestion de la table des matières
    const tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.toc-list a');
    const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');

    function updateActiveTocLink() {
      let current = '';
      sections.forEach(section => {
        const sectionTop = section.offsetTop - 100;
        if (scrollY >= sectionTop) {
          current = section.getAttribute('id');
        }
      });

      tocLinks.forEach(link => {
        link.classList.remove('active');
        if (link.getAttribute('href') === `#${current}`) {
          link.classList.add('active');
        }
      });
    }

    // Barre de progression de lecture
    const readingProgress = document.getElementById('readingProgress');

    function updateReadingProgress() {
      const windowHeight = window.innerHeight;
      const documentHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - windowHeight;
      const scrolled = (window.scrollY / documentHeight) * 100;
      readingProgress.style.width = `${scrolled}%`;
    }

    // Bouton remonter en haut
    const scrollTop = document.getElementById('scrollTop');

    function toggleScrollTop() {
      if (window.scrollY > 300) {
        scrollTop.classList.add('visible');
      } else {
        scrollTop.classList.remove('visible');
      }
    }

    scrollTop.addEventListener('click', () => {
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    });

    faqItems.forEach(item => {
      const question = item.querySelector('.faq-question');

        // Fermer tous les autres items
        faqItems.forEach(otherItem => {
          if (otherItem !== item && otherItem.classList.contains('active')) {
            otherItem.classList.remove('active');
          }
        });
        
        // Basculer l'état de l'item actuel
        item.classList.toggle('active');

    function applyTranslations(lang) {
      const elements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]');
      elements.forEach(element => {
        const key = element.getAttribute('data-i18n');
        if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
          if (element.tagName === 'META' && element.getAttribute('name') === 'description') {
            element.setAttribute('content', translations[lang][key]);
          } else if (element.tagName === 'TITLE') {
            element.textContent = translations[lang][key];
          } else {
            element.textContent = translations[lang][key];
          }
        }
      });

      // Gestion des placeholders
      const placeholderElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n-placeholder]');
      placeholderElements.forEach(element => {
        const key = element.getAttribute('data-i18n-placeholder');
        if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
          element.setAttribute('placeholder', translations[lang][key]);
        }
      });
    }

    // Événements
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      updateActiveTocLink();
      updateReadingProgress();
      toggleScrollTop();
    });

    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      setActiveLang();
      applyTranslations(currentLang);
      updateActiveTocLink();
      updateReadingProgress();
      toggleScrollTop();
      
      // Ouvrir automatiquement la première FAQ
      if (faqItems.length > 0) {
        faqItems[0].classList.add('active');
      }
    });

    // Navigation table des matières
    tocLinks.forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const targetId = link.getAttribute('href');
        const targetElement = document.querySelector(targetId);
        if (targetElement) {
          targetElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
      });
    });

    // Gestion du changement de langue
    langPills.forEach(pill => {
      pill.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const lang = pill.getAttribute('data-lang');
        window.location.href = `?lang=${lang}`;
      });
    });
  </script>
